creator: marco@crowdsec.net
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #3)

Hi, I am testing a version that uses go:modules and I'm happy with the result, will upload it asap, thanks for the motivation!

For the dependencies, a few months ago a new version of re2 came out that requires abseil too. Some architectures may be behind indeed. The last one without abseil was released on 2023-03-01
